g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Telegram bot work as the primary interface for IFYRT?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the IFYRT web dashboard — what can paid users do there?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the IFYRT landing page and its Stripe checkout flow')
sendPrompt('How does the bot gateway parse commands and emit structured events?')
sendPrompt('How does the API gateway enforce JWT auth and subscription tiers?')
sendPrompt('How does n8n orchestrate all IFYRT events? What workflows exist?')
g.text: routes events · enforces subscriptions · triggers workers · no direct service-to-service calls

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the market data ingestor work? What exchanges does it pull from?')
sendPrompt('How does the sim engine achieve determinism? What is the matching engine?')
sendPrompt('How is the live trading engine isolated? What are the circuit breaker rules?')
sendPrompt('How does copy trading work? How are signals shared without exposing strategy code?')
sendPrompt('How does the Binance adapter normalize data for IFYRT?')
sendPrompt('How does the Bybit adapter work in IFYRT?')
sendPrompt('How does the Phemex adapter work in IFYRT?')
sendPrompt('How does key vault management protect exchange API keys in IFYRT?')
sendPrompt('What tables exist in the IFYRT PostgreSQL schema?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the time-series DB — OHLCV, simulation results?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in IFYRT object storage?')
sendPrompt('How does the Stripe payment and subscription webhook flow work?')
sendPrompt('What is logged in the IFYRT platform?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does IFYRT track — sim latency, fill accuracy, drawdown?')
sendPrompt('How does alerting work in IFYRT — circuit breakers, drawdown triggers?')
